description_long: This object is a rectangular whiteboard with a smooth, glossy white writing surface, commonly used in offices, classrooms, or meeting spaces. The board is vertically oriented and appears to have a slim, minimalist frame, likely made of lightweight metal or plastic, with no visible mounting hardware or wheels. Faint blue and gray handwritten markings are visible on the surface, suggesting recent use with dry-erase markers. The frame is thin and unobtrusive, emphasizing the large, uninterrupted writing area. There are no visible trays, holders, or other accessories attached to the board. The overall design is clean and functional, suitable for wall-mounting in urban office or educational environments.
description: A minimalist, frameless whiteboard with faint blue and gray handwritten markings and a large, smooth writing surface.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main writing surface with blue and gray handwritten markings clearly visible.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the thin profile of the board and the edge of the writing surface, with some markings visible along the side.
description_view_2: The rear or opposite side view shows the back edge and a faint outline of the writing surface, with less visible detail.
description_view_3: The right side view displays the slim edge of the board and some markings, similar to the left side.
